response.step_by_step_log: 1. Screened the entire video to check for musical performances. 2. Identified various segments: title card (00:00-00:51), character intro (00:52-01:30), movie-themed skit (01:31-02:19), greeting (02:20-02:30), merchandise promo (02:31-02:35), mystery-themed skit (02:36-03:22), greeting (03:23-03:36), event promo (03:37-03:42), school-themed skit (03:43-04:30), greeting (04:31-04:41), merchandise promo (04:42-04:48), final skit (04:49-05:01). 3. Verified audio in all segments: only instrumental background music, sound effects, and spoken dialogue detected. No vocal songs found. 4. Created JSON object with scene definitions and set vocal music flags to false.
response.global_summary: This video is a 4th-anniversary promotional teaser for 'Secret Society holoX'. It features various skits performed by the four members of holoX, interspersed with greetings, product announcements, and event advertisements. There are no vocal songs featured in this video; the audio consists of instrumental background music, sound effects, and character voiceovers.

scenes.description: Static title card for the 'Secret Society holoX 4th Anniversary'. Background instrumental music plays.
Character introduction sequence with visual overlays featuring La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha. Instrumental theme plays.
A skit presented as a movie trailer, featuring voiceover dialogue and sound effects.
The four holoX members appear to deliver a group greeting.
Static advertisement image for 4th anniversary membership perks.
A mystery-themed skit involving the four members, featuring character dialogue and sound effects.
The four holoX members appear to deliver a group greeting.
Advertisement image for the 'holoX tower invasion' event.
A school-themed skit involving the four members, featuring character dialogue and sound effects.
The four holoX members appear to deliver a group greeting.
Static advertisement image for 4th anniversary membership perks.
A short final skit featuring Hakui Koyori.
